laws.title: IPC Section 498A
laws.summary_en: Protects married women from cruelty by husband or his relatives. Punishment up to 3 years. File FIR at ANY police station — they cannot refuse.
laws.summary_kn: ಪತಿ ಅಥವಾ ಸಂಬಂಧಿಕರಿಂದ ಕ್ರೌರ್ಯದಿಂದ ವಿವಾಹಿತ ಮಹಿಳೆಯರನ್ನು ರಕ್ಷಿಸುತ್ತದೆ. ಶಿಕ್ಷೆ 3 ವರ್ಷಗಳವರೆಗೆ.
laws.summary_hi: विवाहित महिलाओं को पति या उसके रिश्तेदारों की क्रूरता से बचाता है। किसी भी पुलिस स्टेशन में FIR दर्ज करें।
laws.summary_te: భర్త లేదా బంధువుల క్రూరత్వం నుండి వివాహిత మహిళలను రక్షిస్తుంది।
laws.key_point: Police MUST register FIR — cannot refuse

laws.title: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act 2005
laws.summary_en: Covers physical, emotional, sexual and economic abuse. Get Protection Order, Residence Order, Maintenance — WITHOUT filing criminal case. Fastest civil remedy.
laws.summary_kn: ದೈಹಿಕ, ಭಾವನಾತ್ಮಕ, ಲೈಂಗಿಕ ಮತ್ತು ಆರ್ಥಿಕ ದುರ್ವಿನಿಯೋಗ ಒಳಗೊಂಡಿದೆ. ಕ್ರಿಮಿನಲ್ ಕೇಸ್ ಇಲ್ಲದೆ ರಕ್ಷಣಾ ಆದೇಶ ಪಡೆಯಬಹುದು.
laws.summary_hi: शारीरिक, भावनात्मक, यौन और आर्थिक शोषण को कवर करता है। बिना आपराधिक मामले के सुरक्षा आदेश मिल सकता है।
laws.summary_te: శారీరక, భావోద్వేగ, లైంగిక మరియు ఆర్థిక దుర్వినియోగాన్ని కవర్ చేస్తుంది.
laws.key_point: You can STAY in home even if it is in husband's name

laws.title: POCSO Act 2012
laws.summary_en: Protects children under 18 from sexual abuse. Anyone can report — you do not need to be the victim. Report to police or Childline 1098.
laws.summary_hi: 18 साल से कम बच्चों को यौन शोषण से बचाता है। कोई भी रिपोर्ट कर सकता है।
laws.summary_te: 18 సంవత్సరాల లోపు పిల్లలను లైంగిక దుర్వినియోగం నుండి రక్షిస్తుంది.
laws.key_point: Child's identity fully protected by law

laws.title: IPC Section 304B — Dowry Death
laws.summary_en: If a woman dies within 7 years of marriage under suspicious circumstances, husband and in-laws are presumed guilty. Minimum 7 years imprisonment.
laws.summary_kn: ವಿವಾಹದ 7 ವರ್ಷಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಸಂಶಯಾಸ್ಪದ ಸಾವು ಸಂಭವಿಸಿದರೆ ಪತಿ ಮತ್ತು ಮಾವನ ಮನೆಯವರು ತಪ್ಪಿತಸ್ಥರೆಂದು ಪರಿಗಣಿಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ.
laws.summary_hi: विवाह के 7 साल के भीतर संदिग्ध मृत्यु होने पर पति और ससुराल वाले दोषी माने जाते हैं।
laws.summary_te: వివాహం తర్వాత 7 సంవత్సరాల లోపు అనుమానాస్పద మరణం జరిగితే భర్త మరియు అత్తారింటి వారు దోషులుగా పరిగణించబడతారు.

laws.title: IPC Section 354D — Stalking
laws.summary_en: Covers following, monitoring phone or internet activity, contacting repeatedly without consent. Up to 5 years imprisonment.
laws.summary_kn: ಹಿಂಬಾಲಿಸುವುದು, ಫೋನ್ ಅಥವಾ ಇಂಟರ್ನೆಟ್ ಚಟುವಟಿಕೆ ಮೇಲ್ವಿಚಾರಣೆ ಮಾಡುವುದು ಅಪರಾಧ.
laws.summary_hi: पीछा करना, फोन या इंटरनेट गतिविधि की निगरानी करना अपराध है।
laws.summary_te: వెంబడించడం, ఫోన్ లేదా ఇంటర్నెట్ కార్యకలాపాలను పర్యవేక్షించడం నేరం.
laws.key_point: Online monitoring and tracking is also covered

laws.title: Section 125 CrPC — Maintenance
laws.summary_en: Husband must pay maintenance to wife and children if he has means. Available even during separation. Interim maintenance granted quickly.
laws.summary_kn: ಪತಿ ಹೆಂಡತಿ ಮತ್ತು ಮಕ್ಕಳಿಗೆ ಜೀವನಾಂಶ ಕೊಡಲು ಬಾಧ್ಯಸ್ಥ. ವಿಚ್ಛೇದನ ಇಲ್ಲದೆಯೂ ಲಭ್ಯ.
laws.summary_hi: पति को पत्नी और बच्चों का भरण-पोषण करना होगा। अलगाव के दौरान भी मिलता है।
laws.summary_te: భర్త భార్య మరియు పిల్లలకు జీవనభృతి చెల్లించాలి.
laws.key_point: Interim maintenance within weeks of filing

helplines.name: One Stop Centre
helplines.description: Free shelter + legal + medical + police — all under one roof

helplines.name: Childline
helplines.description: For children in danger — anyone can call

helplines.name: NALSA Free Legal Aid
helplines.description: Free lawyer — file case, attend court — completely free

helplines.name: Karnataka Vanitha Sahaya
helplines.description: Karnataka specific — free, toll-free women's support

helplines.name: NCW Helpline
helplines.description: National Commission for Women — escalate police inaction

shelters.name: One Stop Centre (Sakhi Centre)
shelters.description: Government-run. Free. Every district. Shelter + medical + legal + police + counseling under one roof. No documents needed for emergency entry.
shelters.how_to_reach: Call 181 or ask any police station

shelters.name: Short Stay Home (Swadhar Greh)
shelters.description: Free government shelter. Up to 1 year stay. Children can stay with mother.
shelters.how_to_reach: Contact District Women & Child Development Officer or call 181

shelters.name: Nari Adalat
shelters.description: Community-based women's courts for mediation and quick resolution in villages
shelters.how_to_reach: Contact gram panchayat or district WCD officer

landmark_cases.case: Rupali Devi v State of UP (2019)
landmark_cases.principle: Woman can file case where she has taken shelter after leaving — not restricted to where abuse happened

landmark_cases.case: Hiral P. Harsora v Kusum Harsora (2016)
landmark_cases.principle: Female relatives (mother-in-law, sister-in-law) can be respondents under PWDVA — not just husband
PWDVA applies to relationships that existed before 2005 — past abuse can be claimed
Live-in partners have rights similar to wife under PWDVA
Mental cruelty alone is sufficient grounds for divorce — no physical violence required

landmark_cases.case: Lalita Toppo v State of Jharkhand (2018)
landmark_cases.principle: Women in live-in relationships can claim maintenance under PWDVA beyond Section 125 CrPC

landmark_cases.case: Shayara Bano v Union of India (2017)
landmark_cases.principle: Instant Triple Talaq unconstitutional — Muslim women protected from arbitrary divorce

myths.fear: I can only file FIR at the local police station
myths.truth: You can file at ANY police station in India. They must accept it by law.

myths.fear: I will lose my children if I leave
myths.truth: Mother has equal legal right. Courts favour mother for young children. Leaving does not forfeit custody.

myths.fear: I have no money and nowhere to go
myths.truth: One Stop Centres are completely free — shelter, food, legal, medical. Call 181. Walk in with nothing.

myths.fear: Police won't help — it's a family matter
myths.truth: Police are legally obligated to register FIR. If refused, go to Magistrate or file NCW complaint.

myths.fear: Only physical violence counts as abuse
myths.truth: PWDVA covers emotional, verbal, economic, sexual abuse equally. All are valid in court.

myths.fear: It's too late — we've been married 20 years
myths.truth: No time limit on filing PWDVA or 498A. Many women have filed successfully after 20+ years.

myths.fear: He will find me wherever I go
myths.truth: One Stop Centres and short stay homes do not disclose location to anyone including police without her consent.
